overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action-adventure game featuring a female protagonist exploring a misty, teal-lit mountain environment. The character traverses rocky cliffside paths, passes a burning torch marker, and descends toward a beach with bioluminescent blue flora glowing in the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty mountain cliffside path with ancient pine tree

events.description: character begins walking forward along the rocky ledge
burning torch becomes visible on the left ledge ahead

agents.ego_description: Aloy walking carefully along the rocky mountain path, surveying the misty valley below

entered.detail: tall evergreen tree trunk with rough bark texture
steep rock face forming the cliffside boundary
fog-filled canyon with low visibility and teal atmospheric lighting
faint bioluminescent lights visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a misty mountain cliffside with a large pine tree on the right. The character stands on a rocky ledge overlooking a fog-filled valley illuminated by distant blue lights, then begins walking forward along the narrow path.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding cliffside trail with burning torch marker

events.description: warm orange light from burning torch becomes prominent on the left
dialogue subtitle appears indicating narrative moment

agents.ego_description: continuing along the cliff path, passing the burning torch on the upper left ledge while navigating the rocky terrain

entered.detail: flaming torch mounted on a pole providing warm orange illumination
large rock formation beginning to cover the path from above

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the burning torch that marks the cliffside path, transitioning from the open ledge into a more enclosed area with rock overhangs. The warm torchlight contrasts with the cool teal fog as the path curves left.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky overhang path descending toward bioluminescent valley

events.description: path becomes darker as character moves deeper under rock overhangs
sandy beach and bright blue glowing flora become visible ahead

agents.ego_description: carefully descending the rocky path under overhangs, moving toward the glowing blue lights in the valley below

entered.detail: bioluminescent plants or crystals emitting bright cyan-blue light
pale sand area visible at the base of the cliff path

segments.scene_description: Moving under dark rock overhangs that block the sky, the character descends toward a sandy beach area. The path becomes darker and more enclosed, with the bright blue glow of mysterious flora becoming increasingly prominent in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with bioluminescent flora near water

events.description: emerges from under rock overhang into open beach area
approaches the glowing blue flora scattered across the sand

agents.ego_description: approaching the sandy beach with glowing blue objects, moving toward the shoreline

entered.detail: calm water meeting the sandy beach at the valley floor

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the overhang into an open sandy beach area illuminated by bright bioluminescent blue flora. The path descends to the valley floor where calm water meets the shore, with the glowing plants providing the primary light source in the foggy darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty mountain cliffside down into a bioluminescent coastal valley. It begins on a rocky ledge beside a large pine tree, overlooking a fog-filled expanse illuminated by distant blue lights as the character starts walking forward. As the path curves left, the camera moves past a burning torch, transitioning from the open ledge into a more enclosed area where warm firelight contrasts with the cool teal fog. The scene then shifts under dark rock overhangs that block the sky, descending through a narrowing passage where the glow of mysterious flora becomes increasingly prominent. Finally, the character emerges from the shadows onto an open sandy beach, where the path reaches the valley floor and calm water meets a shore lit by bright bioluminescent plants.
